meta.title: Your healthy life, growing here
meta.description: Turn your steps, sleep, and HRV into a self-growing farm. Join the waitlist for early access to TendFarm.

hero.title: Your healthy life, growing here
hero.subtitle: Sleep well, harvest more. Move more, crops ripen early. TendFarm turns your real-life rhythm into a self-growing farm.

activity.title: Activity → Sunlight
activity.desc: When you're active, crops in that time slot grow faster.

vitals.title: Sleep → Morning Dew
vitals.desc: A good night's sleep means a more abundant harvest.

rhythm.title: Life Rhythm → Efficiency
rhythm.desc: A stable daily rhythm boosts your farm's health data conversion by up to 12%.

waitlist.title: Join the waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Get first access to the TestFlight beta
waitlist.success: You're in! We'll notify you when the beta opens.

hay-day.name: Hay Day
hay-day.desc: The most popular mobile farm game

tendfarmHook.title: Did you know?
tendfarmHook.body: There's a farm game driven by your real steps, sleep, and HRV. The more consistent your daily rhythm, the more abundant your harvest.
